sections.paragraph:
ἀπαγγέλλω [ἀπό, ἀγγέλλω]

—1. report back, in response to a directive Mt 2:8; 11:4; Ac 12:17.

—2. ‘to relate as the result of personal experience, observation, or other source of information’, with ἀπό defining the movement of information from one source to another relate, report, declare Mt 14:12; 28:10f; Mk 6:30; Lk 14:21; J 16:25; Ac 4:23; 12:14; 23:16; 1 Cor 14:25; with focus on public aspect: announce, proclaim Mt 12:18; Lk 8:47; Ac 26:20; Hb 2:12; 1 J 1:2f.
